The '''battle''' on [[Keskin]] took place about nine months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In it, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] raided the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] planet of Keskin. [[Malis]], [[Reydon]], and [[Ohvan]] fought in the battle.

==The battle==
[[File:SunberRebellion.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Sunber commanding troops on the battlefield.]]

Many of the beautiful floating structures established on the planet were hit by cannon fire and fell from the sky, littering the battlefields.
A heavily protected [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] fortification was put under siege towards the end of this conflict, with rebel troops ambushing [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] squads while their attention was on the Rebel artillery.

The Rebel's main [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] disabled many walkers and became a priority target. Ordering the walkers to withdraw from the frontlines, the Empire called in airstrikes on the main fortification, leading to cause the downed [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]] leader to crash into the ground and swept across a small portion of the battlefield, crushing soldiers underneath it. After that the Imperials received orders to retreat with heavy losses on both sides.

==Aftermath==
Eventually, the Rebels were devastated and many were taken prisoner. Due to the high death toll on the Imperial side, the prisoners were treated harshly and some were tortured in retaliation.

[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Janek Sunber/Legends|Janek Sunber]] participated in this battle, surviving several near-death experiences and eventually coming to believe his good fortune was caused by a higher will, pushing him forward for an unknown purpose.
This made him determined to hand over information about the Rebel Alliance's great hero, his childhood friend, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].
